name: Etsy sellers processing 10–50 transactions/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 10–50 transactions/month, mismatches between sales and bank deposits cause cash flow gaps. We provide automated reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Mismatches between sales transactions and bank deposits

locked_fields.primary_problem: Mismatches between sales transactions and bank deposits
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Etsy sellers processing 10–50 transactions/month, mismatches between sales and bank deposits cause cash flow gaps. We provide automated reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
